\tzpentry{ID5521}{Hamiltonian Curl Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5521 introduces Hamiltonian Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \nabla\times\mathbf{H} &= \mathbf{J}, \\ \mathbf{J} &= \sigma(\mathbf{E} + \dot{\mathbf{u}}\times\mathbf{B}), \\ \mathbf{B} &= \mu_0(\mathbf{H}+\mathbf{M}). \end{align}
